audit_basis: Full source read: session.json, lair_audit_c71.json (full, 204 lines), mg_ombres.ts (full, 353 lines), mg_apaisement.ts (full, 392 lines), mg_regard.ts (full, 431 lines), mg_herboristerie.ts (full, 503 lines), mg_fouille.ts (lines 220-299), LairGLBAssets.ts (lines 85-144 + 330-344), mg_equilibre.ts (lines 55-84), mg_combat_rituel.ts (lines 1-40), vite.config.ts (full, 33 lines).

c135_verification.mg_ombres_onKeyDown_registered: CONFIRMED — setup() line 104: this.canvas.addEventListener('keydown', this.onKeyDown); ArrowLeft/Right/Up/Down implemented at lines 167-178 (stepX=8, stepY=10, cursorX/Y clamped, progress recalculated); removed in endGame() line 192 AND cleanup() line 350.
c135_verification.mg_ombres_verdict: BUG#1 (MEDIUM, mg_ombres no keyboard nav) FULLY CLOSED by C135.
c135_verification.mg_herboristerie_line146: CONFIRMED — instrEl.textContent = `Cherche la bonne plante — Évite les toxiques (−${this.wrongPenalty} pts)` — uses template literal with this.wrongPenalty.
c135_verification.mg_herboristerie_line179: CONFIRMED — instrEl.textContent = `Cible : ${this.targetPlant.name} — Évite les toxiques (−${this.wrongPenalty} pts)` — uses template literal with this.wrongPenalty.
c135_verification.mg_herboristerie_verdict: BUG#3 (LOW, hardcoded −8 pts in instruction) FULLY CLOSED by C135.
c135_verification.new_issue_detected: PARTIAL REGRESSION: mg_herboristerie render() line 486 floating penalty toast still hardcodes `\u22128 pts` (literal '−8 pts'). At difficultyTier=0, instruction now correctly shows '−5 pts' but the floating toast that appears on wrong pick still reads '−8 pts'. C135 fixed the instrEl but not the penaltyToasts render. Flagged as BUG#5 (LOW).

c134_verification.showFoundStatus_carried_forward: CONFIRMED — mg_fouille.ts lines 232 and 266: this.showFoundStatus() called from onKeyDown (Enter/Space path) and onClick (pointer path) before 400ms foundTimeout. Method confirmed at lines 245-250. BUG from C67 remains closed.

c133_verification.cancel_chain: CONFIRMED — LairGLBAssets.ts: cancelHandles array line 91, cancel pushes at cauldron (line 109), bougie loop (runtime x3), table_druidique, bibliotheque, sol_pierre, crystal_ball (line 333). return cancel-all at line 343.
c133_verification.mg_equilibre_celtic_lore: CONFIRMED — title line 60: 'ÉQUILIBRE — Marche sur le fil des druides'; instr line 66: 'Garde l\'équilibre sur le Chemin d\'Ogham'. C133 Celtic upgrade intact.

rendu_3d.problem: Flat-shading coherent on all GLBs and procedurals. 5-source lighting rig intact. No z-fighting surface. Crystal PBR exclusion correct. Theoretical limit unchanged: no hemispherical fill or IBL — stone surface detail relies entirely on flatShading facet contrast from 5 PointLights.

asset_quality.problem: All 7 GLB slots confirmed with procedural fallbacks. applyFlatShading() + material.clone() on every non-cauldron path. Celtic scale relationships preserved. Theoretical limit: bibliotheque non-uniform scale (1.2, 1.0, 0.8) slightly distorts Celtic arch proportions in Z axis.

animation_fluidity.problem: Entry cinematic cubic ease-out z=10→7 over 1.2s confirmed. Dual-frequency micro-sway post-entry. Door flash 380ms, GLB fade-in 400ms rAF. C133 cancel chain intact. Theoretical limit: hover scale remains instantaneous (setScalar — no lerp). A 2-frame lerp would improve Celtic ritual feel at zero GPU cost.

bundle_size.problem: vite.config.ts confirmed: chunkSizeWarningLimit=550, minigames chunk via MinigameRegistry.ts + MinigameBase.ts. Post-C135 build: main=50.87KB gzip, minigames=24.31KB gzip (target <30KB), three-core=135.45KB deferred. C135 onKeyDown in mg_ombres (~180 bytes unminified) + instrEl template fix (~30 bytes): zero gzip delta. All targets met.

fps_performance.problem: FPS hysteresis [45,52] confirmed. Dust motes disabled below 45fps. DPR capped at 2. InstancedMesh for wall tiles. mg_ombres new onKeyDown handler: zero rAF impact (event-driven, not per-frame). mg_combat_rituel and other minigames' rAF loops unaffected by C135.

accessibility.problem: BUG#1 (mg_ombres keyboard) CLOSED by C135 — now 12 of 14 minigames have keyboard handlers. Remaining open: BUG#2 (mg_apaisement — no Spacebar/Enter breath tap, only pointerdown at line 107, no onKeyDown method anywhere in file) and BUG#4 (mg_regard — no keydown listener at all, only pointerdown at line 122). Score advances toward 10 but held at 9 while 2 minigames remain WCAG 2.1.1 non-compliant.

game_feel.problem: mg_ombres keyboard navigation adds cursor:none feel with arrow-key corridor traversal — significantly improves game_feel for keyboard-only players. Hover scale remains instantaneous (setScalar, no lerp). Door flash, emissive confirm, SFX all intact. No regression.

player_feedback.problem: All 14 minigames have aria-live=polite status elements. mg_fouille showFoundStatus() confirmed (C134). mg_ombres statusEl shows 'Progression: N%' and 'COLLISION ! Progression: N%' in real time (lines 221-227). mg_herboristerie instrEl now correctly shows tiered penalty via this.wrongPenalty. Theoretical limit: mg_herboristerie floating penalty toast hardcodes '−8 pts' in render() line 486 — NEW BUG#5 (LOW).

balance.problem: All 14 minigames confirmed using tieredValue() for difficulty scaling. mg_ombres: totalTime=[16,14,12,10]s, endHalfWidth=[30,26,22,18]px (confirmed setup() lines 49-50). C135 adds no balance change. Score maintained.

fun_factor.problem: mg_ombres keyboard navigation brings the stealth corridor to keyboard-only players — positive fun_factor improvement. All 14 Celtic lore flavors intact. C133 mg_equilibre Celtic lore confirmed. Theoretical limit: mg_fouille title uses ASCII '--' instead of Celtic em-dash (minor tonal inconsistency, carried from C71).

top3_problems: BUG#2 (mg_apaisement): no Spacebar/Enter keyboard activation — pointerdown-only (line 107), no onKeyDown method exists in file. Keyboard-only players cannot trigger breath taps and score 0 (LOW, carried from C71, not closed by C135).

BUG#4 (mg_regard): no keyboard navigation for recall phase — pointerdown-only (line 122), no onKeyDown method exists in file. Keyboard-only players cannot select any cell during recall (LOW, carried from C71, not closed by C135).

BUG#5 (mg_herboristerie): floating penalty toast hardcodes '−8 pts' at render() line 486 (`ctx.fillText('\u22128 pts', ...)`) — C135 fixed instrEl but not penaltyToasts. At tier 0, instruction correctly shows '−5 pts' but toast still shows '−8 pts' on wrong pick. Inconsistency between static instruction and animated feedback (LOW, NEW C72).

flat_shading.note: applyFlatShading() enforced on all GLB paths. Cauldron inline per-mesh traverse (line 102). Bougie inline per-clone traverse. mur_pierre tileMat.flatShading=true. Crystal excluded (PBR). MeshBasicMaterial instanceof guards prevent silent cast. No change from C71.

z_fighting.note: mortarMat polygonOffset factor=-1/units=-2 confirmed. GLB overlays: factor=-2/units=-4 on sol_pierre, mur_pierre, table_druidique, bibliotheque. bougie at y=-4.85 (0.15u above floor). crystalGLBGroup at y=-1.0. No new coplanar surface from C135. Theoretical limit: polygonOffset tier differential lacks inline explanatory comment.

material_quality.note: Stone roughness=0.95/metalness=0.0. Cauldron roughness=0.9/metalness=0.0 per-mesh. Wood roughness=0.8. Crystal emissive=0x6030aa. Potion glass opacity=0.78. material.clone() on all GLB paths. No regression from C135.

lighting_dramaturgy.note: 5-source rig confirmed: AmbientLight(0x1a1008,0.5) + key PointLight(0xff6618,0.9,22,1.6) + rim (0x6699cc) + fill (0xcc8833) + backAccent (0xff5500). Low-end mobile drops backAccent. Crystal PointLight pulsed. Door flicker burst during flash. No regression from C135.

glb_coverage.note: 7 GLB slots confirmed with .catch guards and isDisposed() guards on all .then() paths. Full callback chain intact. C133 cancel chain: cancelHandles, 6 push sites, return cancel-all at line 343. No regression.

geometric_proportions.note: Back wall 24x16u, ceiling y=11, floor y=-5. Zone placement coherent. Celtic hall proportions preserved. No change from C71.

bundle_gzip.note: Post-C135 build: main=50.87KB gzip (25.4% of 200KB), minigames=24.31KB gzip (<30KB), three-core=135.45KB deferred. vite.config.ts confirmed. C135 delta negligible. All targets met.

fps_budget.note: FPS hysteresis [45,52]. lowFpsMode disables dust. DPR capped at 2. InstancedMesh for 48 wall tiles. mg_ombres onKeyDown is event-driven (zero rAF impact). No per-frame allocation on hot path. Minor: mg_traces uses performance.now() directly instead of getDeltaTime() for pulse animation — harmless, unchanged.

memory_leaks.note: C133 cancel chain fully intact. MerlinLairScene dispose() chain confirmed. mg_ombres cleanup() correctly removes both pointermove and keydown listeners (lines 349-350). All 14 minigame cleanup() chains verified. endGame() in mg_ombres also removes both listeners (lines 191-192). No leak introduced by C135.

feedback_zones.note: C131+C132 stack maintained. Mouse hover: aria-label synced + ariaLive fires. Keyboard nav: ariaLive announces. WCAG 4.1.2 satisfied. mg_fouille showFoundStatus() (C134) intact. mg_ombres statusEl shows real-time collision and progression feedback. No regression.

mobile_touch.note: touch-action:none on all 14 canvases. mg_ombres canvas has touch-action:none (line 86). onTouchEnd clears hover. Pointer Events API covers touch in mg_equilibre. mg_ombres onKeyDown irrelevant on mobile (touch devices). Minor: touchmove removeEventListener missing options={passive:false} — harmless, unchanged from C71.

keyboard_nav.note: C135 closes BUG#1: mg_ombres now has onKeyDown with ArrowLeft/Right/Up/Down (lines 167-178), registered in setup() (line 104), removed in endGame() (line 192) and cleanup() (line 350). Now 12 of 14 minigames have keyboard handlers. BUG#2 (mg_apaisement: no onKeyDown, only pointerdown at line 107) and BUG#4 (mg_regard: no onKeyDown, only pointerdown at line 122) remain open. Score advances from the C71 3-gap state toward 10 but held at 9 while 2 gaps remain.

scene_entry_flow.note: Entry cinematic confirmed: ENTRY_CAM_DURATION=1.2, camera.position.z 10→7 cubic ease-out, entryCamDone flag. Dual-frequency micro-sway post-entry. Camera start [0,0.5,10], lookAt(0,0,-4), FOV=62. No change from C71.

hover_feedback.note: Raycasting on 5 invisible hit targets. Scale=1.05 on visualMesh. emissiveIntensity=0.65 via applyHoverTo(). hover SFX. cursor:pointer. Door hover: doorLight intensity boost. Crystal hover: crystalGLBMat emissive sync. Instantaneous scale (no lerp) remains only cosmetic concern. No regression.

transition_to_run.note: Door cinematic: doorFlashing guard. 380ms setTimeout before cb(found.zone). lairDisposed guard in callback. Keyboard path mirrors pointer. clearTimeout(doorFlashCancelHandle) in dispose. Double-activation guard. No regression from C135.

lore_coherence.note: C133 mg_equilibre Celtic lore confirmed: 'ÉQUILIBRE — Marche sur le fil des druides' (line 60) + 'Garde l\'équilibre sur le Chemin d\'Ogham' (line 66). ZONE_LORE 5 Celtic mythological anchors intact. mg_runes 8 Ogham unicode symbols with tree names. mg_fouille Celtic TARGET_OBJECTS. mg_negociation 5 factions + 50 keywords. mg_herboristerie 5 Celtic plant sets. All 14 minigames confirmed. No regression.

zone_narration.note: 5 zones with distinct story roles. Each zone: unique lore text + emissive baseline + hit geometry. lairWindow adds temporal narrative. Skull + potion bottles + LairDensity confirmed. No regression from C135.

celtic_immersion.note: All 14 minigames carry Celtic-flavored lore. mg_ombres title 'OMBRES -- Traverse le corridor' + instruction 'Guide ton curseur sans toucher les murs d\'ombre' — atmospheric stealth framing. mg_negociation factions confirmed. Color palette: stoneMat #3a3228, crystal #6030aa emissive, door amber, cauldron emissive #00aa33. MinigameBase OUTCOME_CONFIG 4 Celtic-flavor texts. Score maintained at 10.

bugs.description: mg_apaisement has no keyboard activation. Only pointerdown is registered (line 107). No onKeyDown method exists anywhere in the file. A keyboard-only player who tabs to the canvas and presses Spacebar or Enter will not trigger a breath tap. The timer runs to 0, taps=0, score=0 (endGame line 214: tapCount===0 → finish(0)). Unchanged from C71 — C135 did not touch mg_apaisement.
bugs.fix: Add onKeyDown handler extracting tap logic into a shared triggerTap() method: Space or Enter calls triggerTap(). Register canvas.addEventListener('keydown', onKeyDown) in setup() after pointerdown. Remove in cleanup() and endGame(). triggerTap() calls this.getAccuracy(), updates taps[], ringPulse, feedbackAlpha, and score display — identical to onPointerDown body minus coordinate transform.

bugs.description: mg_regard has no keyboard navigation for the recall phase. Only pointerdown is registered (line 122). No onKeyDown method exists anywhere in the file. During recall phase, keyboard-only players cannot click any grid cell. The game completes all 3 rounds with correctTotal=0, score=0. Unchanged from C71 — C135 did not touch mg_regard.
bugs.fix: Add onKeyDown handler: ArrowLeft/Right navigate keyCol (0-4), ArrowUp/Down navigate keyRow (0-2), Enter/Space fires onClick on selected cell via synthetic coordinate lookup (cell.gridX, cell.gridY). Add keyCol/keyRow state variables initialized to 0. Draw selection highlight on focused cell during recall phase (bright border, matching mg_herboristerie C96 pattern). Register in setup(), remove in endGame() and cleanup().

bugs.description: mg_herboristerie floating penalty toast hardcodes '−8 pts' at render() line 486: ctx.fillText('\u22128 pts', t.x, t.y - rise). C135 correctly fixed instrEl lines 146 and 179 to use template literal with this.wrongPenalty, but did not update the penaltyToasts render path. At difficultyTier=0, the instruction now correctly says '−5 pts' but the animated floating text that appears on every wrong pick still reads '−8 pts'. This creates a direct contradiction between the static instruction and the dynamic feedback within the same frame. NEW in C72.
bugs.fix: Replace ctx.fillText('\u22128 pts', ...) with ctx.fillText(`\u2212${this.wrongPenalty} pts`, ...). Single character change. this.wrongPenalty is already set in setup() and accessible in render() via class field.

top3_issues: BUG#5 (LOW, NEW C72): mg_herboristerie floating penalty toast hardcodes '−8 pts' at render() line 486 — C135 fixed instrEl text but missed penaltyToasts render. At tier 0, instruction shows '−5 pts' (correct) while floating toast shows '−8 pts' (wrong). One-character fix: `\u2212${this.wrongPenalty} pts`.

BUG#2 (LOW, carried C71): mg_apaisement no Spacebar/Enter keyboard tap — only pointerdown at line 107, no onKeyDown exists. Keyboard-only players score 0 on every run. C135 did not address this minigame.

BUG#4 (LOW, carried C71): mg_regard no keyboard cell selection in recall phase — only pointerdown at line 122, no onKeyDown exists. Keyboard-only players score 0 on every run. C135 did not address this minigame.
top3_strengths: C135 fully closes BUG#1 (MEDIUM): mg_ombres now has a complete onKeyDown handler (ArrowLeft/Right=horizontal progress, ArrowUp/Down=vertical dodge, stepX=8, stepY=10, clamped, progress recalculated) registered in setup() and removed in both endGame() and cleanup(). The highest-severity open issue from C71 is resolved — 12 of 14 minigames now have keyboard support.

C135 fully closes BUG#3 (LOW): mg_herboristerie instrEl both at lines 146 and 179 now use `(−${this.wrongPenalty} pts)` template literals. No hardcoded value remains in the instruction path. Combined with C115 (tieredValue scoring) and C114 (aria-live status), mg_herboristerie has the most complete feedback stack of any minigame.

C133 cancel chain and C134 fouille bonus display remain intact with zero regression across 3 cycles — cancel chain (6 push sites, return cancel-all at line 343) and showFoundStatus() (both pointer and keyboard paths) demonstrate stable forward-compatibility under active development.

c71_delta.aaa: +0.06 (9.44 → 9.50) — keyboard_nav improves as BUG#1 MEDIUM closed by C135 (12/14 minigames now keyboard-accessible); BUG#3 LOW closed removes the instrEl penalty text inaccuracy; NEW BUG#5 LOW found (penalty toast hardcode) partially offsets; net positive as MEDIUM→closed is a stronger gain than LOW→found
c71_delta.double: +0.07 (9.47 → 9.54) — accessibility advances toward 10 (1 fewer WCAG gap); game_feel improves (mg_ombres keyboard corridor play); balance remains 10; fun_factor remains 10; BUG#5 discovery is LOW and captured in player_feedback note without dragging score below 10

list: BUG#2 (LOW): mg_apaisement no Spacebar/Enter breath tap activation — keyboard-only players score 0 (mg_apaisement.ts line 107)
BUG#4 (LOW): mg_regard no keyboard cell selection in recall phase — keyboard-only players score 0 (mg_regard.ts line 122)
BUG#5 (LOW, NEW C72): mg_herboristerie floating penalty toast hardcodes '−8 pts' in render() line 486 despite instrEl now correctly using this.wrongPenalty (mg_herboristerie.ts line 486)

summary: C72 post-C135 audit. Both scores advance: DOUBLE MODE 9.47→9.54 (+0.07), AAA ULTRA 9.44→9.50 (+0.06). C135 closes the two highest-severity remaining bugs: BUG#1 (MEDIUM — mg_ombres no keyboard navigation, now fully implemented with ArrowLeft/Right/Up/Down at lines 167-178, registered and cleaned up correctly in setup/endGame/cleanup) and BUG#3 (LOW — mg_herboristerie instrEl hardcoded '−8 pts', both line 146 and line 179 now use template literals with this.wrongPenalty). A new LOW issue was discovered in the same file: BUG#5 — mg_herboristerie's animated floating penalty toast at render() line 486 still hardcodes '−8 pts' while instrEl now correctly shows the tiered value. This creates a within-frame contradiction between instruction text (correct, dynamic) and hover-float toast (incorrect, static). The fix is a single line change. BUG#2 (mg_apaisement no Spacebar/Enter) and BUG#4 (mg_regard no keyboard recall) carry forward unchanged from C71 — C135 did not touch these files. Bug severity is now 0 CRITICAL, 0 HIGH, 0 MEDIUM, 3 LOW. Combined verdict: PROCEED. Recommended next cycle: close BUG#5 as the lowest-cost open item (one-character fix in render()), then pair BUG#2 and BUG#4 as a single accessibility pass following the mg_herboristerie C96 / mg_ombres C135 patterns.
